reviewedItem.prompt:
Create a magical halberd that requires attunement.

Base weapon:
- Weapon type: Halberd
- Magical bonus: +3 to attack rolls and damage rolls

On-hit damage:
- Every successful hit deals an additional 3d4 cold damage.

First attack each turn:
- On the wielder’s first attack of each turn, the creature hit must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw.
- On a failed save, the creature is stunned for 1 round.
- This saving throw applies only to the first attack made by the wielder each turn.

Radiant aura:
- As a bonus action, the wielder may activate a 20-foot-radius aura.
- The aura requires concentration and lasts up to 1 minute.
- Hostile creatures that start their turn inside the aura take 2d6 radiant damage.
- The wielder is immune to this aura’s damage.
- The aura ends immediately when concentration ends.
- Keep the aura activation separate from the aura’s damage behavior.

Damage protection reaction:
- When an ally within 30 feet takes damage, the wielder may use a reaction.
- Reduce the damage by 1d10 + the wielder’s proficiency bonus.
- This reaction can be used twice per long rest.
- Track these uses separately from all other item resources.
- Prompt the wielder to select the affected ally before applying the reduction.

Keep the attack bonus, on-hit damage, saving throw, aura, concentration, damage timing, reaction, target selection, and resource tracking as separate mechanics where possible.

Document text: ```
Create a magical halberd that requires attunement.

Base weapon:
- Weapon type: Halberd
- Magical bonus: +3 to attack rolls and damage rolls

On-hit damage:
- Every successful hit deals an additional 3d4 cold damage.

First attack each turn:
- On the wielder’s first attack of each turn, the creature hit must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw.
- On a failed save, the creature is stunned for 1 round.
- This saving throw applies only to the first attack made by the wielder each turn.

Radiant aura:
- As a bonus action, the wielder may activate a 20-foot-radius aura.
- The aura requires concentration and lasts up to 1 minute.
- Hostile creatures that start their turn inside the aura take 2d6 radiant damage.
- The wielder is immune to this aura’s damage.
- The aura ends immediately when concentration ends.
- Keep the aura activation separate from the aura’s damage behavior.

Damage protection reaction:
- When an ally within 30 feet takes damage, the wielder may use a reaction.
- Reduce the damage by 1d10 + the wielder’s proficiency bonus.
- This reaction can be used twice per long rest.
- Track these uses separately from all other item resources.
- Prompt the wielder to select the affected ally before applying the reduction.

Keep the attack bonus, on-hit damage, saving throw, aura, concentration, damage timing, reaction, target selection, and resource tracking as separate mechanics where possible.
```
